---
title: "Arthur Berg, Ph.D."
subtitle: "Professor of Biostatistics · Penn State College of Medicine"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: photo.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:berg@psu.edu
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/arthurberg
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/arthurberg
    - text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4097-7348
    - text: Penn State Pure
      href: https://pennstate.pure.elsevier.com/en/persons/arthur-berg
    - text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=asQf9VQAAAAJ
---

## About

I am a tenured **Professor of Biostatistics** in the Department of Public
Health Sciences at the Penn State College of Medicine, with joint
appointments in the Departments of Surgery, Neurosurgery, Family and
Community Medicine, and Statistics. I directed Penn State's Biostatistics
PhD Program from 2011 to 2024, and currently serve as **Lead Biostatistician
for Pediatric Oncology Clinical Trials** at Penn State — with a central
role in the [Beat Childhood Cancer Research Consortium](bcc.qmd).

My [research](research.qmd) spans methodological biostatistics and applied
collaborations across oncology, neuroscience, spinal cord injury,
environmental physiology, and more. Recent methodological interests
include Bayesian clinical trial design, statistical genetics, and
interdisciplinary applications of data science — including an
entropy-based approach to Chinese character learning.

Outside of my Penn State work, I provide [biostatistical expert-witness
testimony](services.qmd) and serve as an [independent biostatistician on
data monitoring committees](services.qmd), and I consult on
[AI-powered research and workflow tooling](services.qmd) for researchers,
professionals, and organizations. I also serve as **Director of
Music** at [Trinity Evangelical Lutheran Church in Lemoyne, PA](music.qmd).

Raised in [Grifton, North Carolina](https://grifton.com/) — home of the
annual [Shad Festival](https://griftonshadfestival.com/). Attended
[Wiley Elementary School](https://www.wcpss.net/wileyes) and
[Leesville Road Middle School](https://www.wcpss.net/leesvilleroadms) in
Raleigh, [Ayden-Grifton High School](https://aghs.pitt.k12.nc.us/), and the
[North Carolina School of Science and Mathematics](https://www.ncssm.edu/).

[View CV →](cv.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Research](research.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
[Beat Childhood Cancer](bcc.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
[Download CV (PDF)](Berg-CV.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
[Get in touch](contact.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
